title: Prometheus Query Engine Active Concurrency Limit Timeouts
dataSources: Prometheus API server query logs (`--log.level=info` with query logging enabled) as `prometheus:log`
app: Enable optional query logging to file or sidecar; ship via UF
spl:
index=prometheus sourcetype="prometheus:log"
| search "query" AND ("timeout" OR "concurrency" OR "max concurrent")
| stats count by host, user
| where count>=20
| sort -count
description: Concurrency saturation blocks Grafana and automation queries during incidents.
value: Reveals when horizontal query sharding or limits need tuning.
implementation: Do not log raw query parameters containing secrets; scrub at ingest.
visualization: Bar chart (timeouts by user), Line chart (rate).
